---
title: "NHM Living Labs Urban Research Station Implementation Report — DS18B20 Thermometers"
author:
  - name: Ed Baker
    affiliation: Natural History Museum, London
citation:
  container-title: NHM Living Labs Reports
  issue: 3
---
<!-- HTML-only download link (hidden in PDF) -->
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[![](/assets/images/icons/pdf.svg){width=24px height=auto style="vertical-align:middle;"}](/assets/pdfs/3_Implementation-Report_DS18B20-Thermometers.pdf) [Download PDF](/assets/pdfs/3_Implementation-Report_DS18B20-Thermometers.pdf)
:::

Blh blah blaaah
